title: Star Wars Tales 10
content:
{{Top|rwm|inf|title=''Star Wars Tales'' 10}} {{ComicBook |anthology=1 |image=[[File:Swta10cover.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Tales'' 10 |writer=*[[Garth Ennis]] *[[Mike Kennedy]] *[[Christian Read]] *[[Jason Hall]] *[[Brett Matthews]] |penciller=*[[Lucas Marangon]] *[[John McCrea]] *[[Francisco Ruiz Velasco]] *[[Chris Slane]] *[[Christina Chen]] *[[Vatche Mavlian]] |inker=[[Jimmy Palmiotti]] |letterer=*[[Steve Dutro]] *[[Jason Hvam]] *[[Michelle Madsen]] |colorist=*[[Brad Anderson]] *[[Giulia Brusco]] *[[Matt Hollingsworth]] *[[Dan Jackson]] *Michelle Madsen |cover artist=[[Leinil Francis Yu]] |editor=*[[David Land|Dave Land]] *[[Diana Schutz]] *[[Scott Allie]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[December 12]], [[2001]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53988/star_wars_tales_1999_10|text=Star Wars Tales (1999) #10}} |pages=64 |upc= |timeline= |series=''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' |issue=10 }} '''''Star Wars Tales'' 10''' is the tenth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[December 12]], [[2001]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Ever wondered what it would be like to be a stormtrooper? Working for the Empire, never sure where you're going next, following orders without question, ready to lay down your life for the Emperor? Writer Garth Ennis (''Preacher'', ''Hitman'') and penciller John McCrea (''Hitman'', ''Superboy'') take us on a journey that shows in agonizing detail what it's like for those troops in white. Also in this issue are New Zealand newcomers Christian Read and Chris Slane offering the story of a Sith Lord, a lightsaber, and a bit of innovation… This and MUCH, MUCH more in an all-new, action-packed ''Star Wars Tales''!'' ==Continuity== {{Quote|Use the Force!''"
"''Beware the Dark Side!''"
"''Make your own copies!''"
"''Do or do not… there is no try!''"
"''I'm a person! My name is Anakin!|Midi-chlorians|''Star Wars Tales'' 10}} ''Star Wars Tales'' editor [[David Land|Dave Land]] and [[Medical droid/Legends|medic droid]] [[2-1B/Legends|2-1B]] are shrunken in size and inserted into the body of a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] to search for [[Midi-chlorian/Legends|midi-chlorians]] and learn their appearance. Land and 2-1B discover, to their horror, that the midi-chlorians resemble assistant editor [[Philip Simon]], and Land chases them off, ordering them back to work. At the end of ''Star Wars Tales'' 10, Mike and Sulley from Monsters, Inc. can be seen on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. ==Contents== *"[[Trooper (comic story)|Trooper]]" *"[[Skreej]]" *"[[Nameless (comic story)|Nameless]]" *"[[A Wookiee Scorned!]]" *"[[Free Memory]]" ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars Tales 10}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Swta10cover.jpg|Cover File:SWT10-FC.jpg|Full cover art File:StarWarsTales10-PhotoCover.jpg|Photo cover variant File:SWTales10PhotoCover-Textless-EC.png|Textless photo cover ===Collected in=== *''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 3]]'' ==Appearances== {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= |organisms= |droids= |events= |locations= |organizations= |species= |vehicles= |technology= |miscellanea= }} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/11-013/Star-Wars-Tales-10|text=Star Wars Tales #10}} *{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/11-015/Star-Wars-Tales-10-photo-cover|text=Star Wars Tales #10 (photo cover)}} *{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53988/star_wars_tales_1999_10|text=Star Wars Tales (1999) #10}} {{TalesNav}} {{Interlang |es=Star Wars Tales 10 |fr=Star Wars Tales 10 |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: ისტორიები 10 |nl=Star Wars Tales 10 |pl=Tales 10 }} [[Category:Star Wars Tales issues|10]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Star Wars Tales 10 stories]] }}
